34996.description: Sorn Grimhill the 4th was first described as short, slender, brown hair, amber eyes, with bold bearing.

34997.description: Luca Bramgate the 3rd was first described as average height, lean, black hair, amber eyes, with steady bearing.

34998.description: Vesna Bramgate the 2nd was first described as short, broad shouldered, closely shorn hair, gray eyes, with steady bearing.

34999.description: Jora Torovar was first described as short, sturdy, auburn hair, blue eyes, with calm bearing.
